{{CargoRelic
|name=Monkey on Vigil
|class_id=20167
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Although at first glance it is just a statue of a monkey with dark circles, its seemingly simple but exquisite costumes, lifelike facial expressions, and the fineness of each hair express to its audience that it may be a masterpiece from an unknown master craftsman.
|fame=14
|art=34
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +1<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +2<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Jinx Points: 600/600
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Jinx Points: 600/600<br> (Awakened)
}}
